title: Product Repo Safety Gate Review Pack

secretBoundaryReview.rule: No API keys, OAuth tokens, DB credentials

customerDataBoundaryReview.rule: No lead PII (name/email/phone/address) in code, prompts, or logs

deployRiskReview.note: Staging required before production. No auto-deploy.

gitOperationReview.note: No git write operations are auto-approved. All require explicit じゅんやさん YES.

allowedActions: Read src files in allowed zones (dry-run)
blockedActions: Access customer PII / insurance data / health records / financial data
Run arbitrary shell commands without human review
humanApprovalGates: こさめ/GPT PM: task scope and safety review before dispatch
Claude: implementation + node --check before staging any file
こさめ/GPT PM: diff review and verification result review before commit
じゅんやさん: explicit final YES before git add / commit / push / tag / deploy
recommendedNextAction: Safety gate passed. Proceed to First Real Product Repo Execution Prompt Pack (v24.0.0).
